nodes.label: AI as exploratory partner for understanding
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for production-critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI when it's an exploratory question that I can utilize AI to help explore

nodes.label: AI as productivity tool for large file analysis
nodes.grounding_span: doing an analysis of large files so that I don't have to understand everything in the file to make specific changes

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination and wild goose chases
nodes.grounding_span: the AI was sending me on a wild goose chase that took time to validate

nodes.label: Human oversight for correctness
nodes.label_negative: AI autonomous code generation without validation
nodes.grounding_span: I will not use AI, or I will specifically validate everything that AI creates and re-write it myself

nodes.label: AI understanding of business context
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to grasp full codebase context
nodes.grounding_span: the majority of my job is understanding business requirements and understand where to implement those requirements across the 20+ code bases

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: using AI just saves me from clicking into another window

nodes.label: Code correctness and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I will not use AI, or I will specifically validate everything that AI creates and re-write it myself

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI is really going to take over any substantial portion of my job in the foreseeable future

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as exploratory aid
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not sure whether or not I would have gotten to the solution without AI's help in analyzing the DLL internals

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracies
nodes.grounding_span: the AI was sending me on a wild goose chase that took time to validate

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing core job functions
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI is really going to take over any substantial portion of my job in the foreseeable future

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will not use AI, or I will specifically validate everything that AI creates and re-write it myself

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I will collaborate throughout the exploratory process because I'm usually in a refining process where my questions are getting clearer

nodes.label: Domain compartmentalization — strict boundaries between exploration and production
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI when it's an exploratory question... But when it's an actual change that will make it to production, I will not use AI
